productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girls Navy Stripes Mickey Kidswear
description: CompositionNavy blue round neck red t-shirt in 100% cotton with white stripes and random appliqués near the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soaking and remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shade.Warm iron only, do not iron directly on print/embroideryIt's all fun 'n' frolic with this navy tee from disney's collection. While the random cartoon graphics of an anchor, a steam boat and mickey are so true-to-life with the activities your child is involved in, mickey joins him in all the fun. Team this tee with denim or cargo shorts or trousers and your handsome young man is all set for a fun evening, while the cotton fabric keeps him dry and comfortable through all seasons. Add on a pair of comfortable and well ventilated footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra to give him that absolute comfort in style.
